title: GeoNames Reference Collection
html:
This folder stores the GeoNames China country dump used as a clean-room modern reference for Phase 1 map construction.

Collected slice:

  • File: CN.zip.
  • Text entry: CN.txt.
  • Retrieved: 2026-06-23.
  • Records: 958,158 text rows in CN.txt.
  • License/readme file: readme.txt.
  • Machine-readable evidence manifest:

data/era-packages/southern-ming/curated/geography/phase1_map_source_evidence_manifest.json.

  • Source registry record:

map_source.geonames.china.2026_06_23.v1 in data/core/map-data/world_map_source_registry.json.

Use:

  • Modern coordinate anchors for Phase 1 settlements and gateways.
  • Province/prefecture disambiguation for homonymous places.
  • Fallback coordinates for local places too small for Natural Earth populated

places.

Do not use it as historical truth for Southern Ming identity, administrative status, political control, culture, religion, route quality, or boundaries.

Attribution:

  • GeoNames data is documented by the local readme.txt as Creative Commons

Attribution 4.0.

  • Any public package that includes derived GeoNames-backed outputs must include

appropriate attribution and preserve the manifest record.
